data.description: Indonesia stocks climbed 1.1% to 7,364.031 points, reaching their highest level since December 13, 2024.

data.title: Mapxus and Ricoh join forces to optimize indoor mapping with 360-degree cameras in APAC, improving navigation and spatial data.
data.description: In Hong Kong, a partnership has been formed between Mapxus and Ricoh to integrate RICOH360 and Mapxus indoor mapping technologies. This collaboration aims to utilize 360° cameras to improve navigation, tours, and spatial data specifically in the Asia-Pacific region. This joint effort is expected to enhance user experiences and provide more comprehensive mapping services.

data.title: AGC introduces new Fluoroelastomer w/ no surfactants or fluorinated solvents. Innovative technology.
data.description: AGC has introduced a groundbreaking fluoroelastomer in Tokyo without the need for surfactants or fluorinated polymerization solvents. This innovative product is set to revolutionize the industry with its advanced technology.

data.title: AV Access unveils eShare W90 4K Wireless Conferencing System at InfoComm Asia 2025 in Thailand, happening July 23-25.
data.description: In Bangkok, AV Access will present the cutting-edge eShare W90 4K wireless conferencing system at InfoComm Asia 2025 from July 23 to 25.

data.title: Dow falls amid Trump trade deal, crypto vote faces setback. Nvidia stock surges on AI chip sales to China.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline in a mixed trading session. One noteworthy highlight was Nvidia's stock, which saw a surge due to increased sales of AI chips to China. This occurred amid news of the Dow falling amidst uncertainties surrounding the Trump trade deal. Additionally, there was a setback in a crypto vote. For live coverage and more updates on market trends, refer to the latest from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Report: Trump considers executive order allowing retirement funds access to crypto. White House says official details only from Trump.
data.description: According to a White House representative, Kush Desai, it has been emphasized to Cointelegraph that any official decisions must be directly communicated by President Trump himself.
